description_long: This house features a traditional brick exterior with a steeply pitched gable roof covered in gray shingles. The front facade includes three large windows and a prominent dormer with an awning above the central window, adding architectural interest. On one side, there is a spacious carport with a flat roof supported by columns, seamlessly integrated into the structure. The rear of the house has double glass doors leading to a paved patio area, and additional windows provide ample natural light. The property is bordered by a strip of green lawn and a low brick base, giving it a well-maintained suburban appearance. The overall design is practical and inviting, suitable for a family residence in a modern neighborhood.
description: A brick house with a steep gable roof, dormer, and attached carport, featuring large windows and a rear patio with double glass doors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance facade with three windows, a dormer, and the carport to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable end, carport structure, and the transition from the pitched roof to the flat carport roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying double glass doors, a paved patio, and the flat-roofed carport extending from the side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the gable end, two windows, and a clear view of the brickwork and roofline.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows on front, asymmetrical on sides and rear
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with three-pane windows, dormer above, and adjacent carport with covered walkway
